member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.FivrCondition
member.summary: Gets or sets the fivr condition name.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.Overrides
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of overrides using specific syntax.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.RailConfigurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of rail configurations.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.DlvrPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of dlvr pins.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.OverrideExpressions
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of override dlvr expressions.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.GuardBand
member.summary: Gets or sets the guard band value.

member.name: P:DDG.VoltageConverterOptions.Ituff
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ituff printing is enabled.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.GetRailConfigurations(System.String)
member.summary: Parses command line and extracts list of configurations.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.ParseCommandLine(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses command line and extracts all options.
member.returns: Voltage converter options. Null if there are no options.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.GetVoltageObject(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,DDG.VoltageConverterOptions@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets VForcePinAttribute object for voltage overrides.
member.param: Fivr condition, empty will default to VForcePinAttribute.
Trigger test condition for Vbump mode.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.GetVForceAttributesFromLevel(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets VForce required attributes from levels.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.ApplyInitialVoltage(Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary: Applies initial voltage using VoltageConverter and/or Prime voltage object.

member.name: M:DDG.VoltageHandler.ApplySearchVoltage(Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String,DDG.VoltageConverterOptions)
member.summary: Applies search voltage using VoltageConverter, Prime VoltageObject and/or offset.
member.param: Offset. Double, SharedStorage Key or UerVar.
